cases.name: memory_and_routing
cases.task: Summarize this in one short sentence: Genie stores durable memory locally, routes non-secret work across provider lanes, and keeps a frontier fallback for hard tasks.

cases.name: ops_stack
cases.task: Summarize this infrastructure note in at most two short bullets: Docker runs the native Genie services, Ollama hosts local models, and backups are saved hourly and daily for respawn recovery.
